Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 183 

SR_SPLMTL_PHYS_ACTVTY_1_2_QTY 

LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Physical Activity Items 1 x 2 Numb of Days/Minutes Moderate Exercise 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) physical activity calculated field. 
This field is the physical activity items 1 – moderate exercise days (field called 
SR_SPLMTL_PHYS_ACTVTY_1_CD) multiplied by physical
